description: Migrate the 'DataPipeline' project in the Eclipse workspace from using System.out.println and System.err.println to java.util.logging.Logger. Refactor all classes to use a private static final Logger named LOGGER (initialized with the class name), replacing System.out.println with LOGGER.info and System.err.println with LOGGER.severe. Do not convert the final System.out.println in src/main/java/com/datapipeline/main/Main.java that prints the pipeline result summary. Verify the migration by ensuring the project compiles and runs. Create a text file at /home/ga/eclipse-workspace/DataPipeline/migration_report.txt listing the number of files modified.
